home.title: The digital tontine
home.subtitle: Run a tontine without falling out with friends.
home.subtitleLine2: Automatic collection, transparent distribution, zero stress.
home.step1Desc: Set the amount, frequency and number of participants in a few clicks.
home.step2Desc: Share a secure link. Each member joins and sets up automatic payment.
home.step3Desc: Contributions are collected automatically via Stripe. No more chasing anyone.
home.step4Desc: The beneficiary receives the pot via Interac transfer. Every transaction is tracked.
home.security1Desc: Powered by Stripe, the world leader in online payments. Your banking details never pass through our servers.
home.security2Desc: Transparent pricing. You know exactly what you pay, with no surprises.
home.security3Desc: Every contribution and distribution is recorded. View the complete history at any time.

metadata.title: DiaspoFinance — Digital tontine for the diaspora
metadata.description: Run a tontine without falling out with friends. Automatic collection, transparent distribution, zero stress.

dashboard.placeholder: Your DiaspoFinance space is under construction.
dashboard.empty: No tontines yet. Create one to get started!

offline.title: Offline mode
offline.message: Reconnect to the Internet to access DiaspoFinance. Payment actions are not available offline.
offline.banner: Offline mode — displayed data may not be up to date

errors.unauthorized: Session expired — please sign in again
errors.serverError: Server error — please try again shortly

create.title: Create a tontine
create.step2Desc: How much each member contributes per turn
create.step3Desc: How often and when collections begin
create.startDateHelp: The first collection will take place on this date
create.reserveHelp: A small surcharge to cover missed payments, refunded at end of cycle
create.successDesc: Your tontine "{name}" is ready. Invite your people to get started.

announcements.title: Announcements
announcements.empty: No announcements yet. The organizer will be able to share messages here soon.
announcements.placeholder: Share an announcement with your group...
announcements.confirmDelete: Are you sure you want to delete this announcement?

start.title: Start the cycle
start.confirmMessage: Once started, no new members can join and the rotation order will be locked. This action is irreversible.
start.cycleStarted: The tontine cycle has been started successfully.
start.locked: The rotation order is now locked

detail.closedMemberships: Memberships are closed once the cycle starts.

invite.title: You're invited to join
invite.shareMessage: Join my tontine "{name}" on DiaspoFinance! Hand of {amount}.
